# fleetdm_software_title (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a FleetDM software title.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific software title by ID
data "fleetdm_software_title" "chrome" {
  id = 1
}

output "software_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_title.chrome.name
}

output "software_source" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_title.chrome.source
}

output "versions_count" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_title.chrome.versions_count
}

output "hosts_count" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_title.chrome.hosts_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the software title.

### Optional

- `team_id` (Number) Filter by team ID.

### Read-Only

- `bundle_identifier` (String) The bundle identifier (for macOS apps).
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the software.
- `hosts_count` (Number) The number of hosts with this software installed.
- `icon_url` (String) URL to the software icon.
- `name` (String) The name of the software.
- `source` (String) The source of the software (e.g., 'programs', 'apps', 'deb_packages').
- `versions` (Attributes List) List of versions for this software title. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--versions))
- `versions_count` (Number) The number of versions of this software.

<a id="nestedatt--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `versions`

Read-Only:

- `hosts_count` (Number) The number of hosts with this version.
- `id` (String) The version ID.
- `version` (String) The version string.
- `vulnerabilities` (List of String) List of CVE identifiers for vulnerabilities in this version.
